data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified user interfaces to reduce the time required to make decisions.
data.technical_spec: Clear and intuitive navigation, minimalistic design to limit choices.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Buttons and interactive elements designed for ease of clicking and accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Size and positioning of UI elements are optimized for touchscreens.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: UI components are grouped for easier perception and interaction.
data.technical_spec: Layout design that clusters related elements to guide user flow.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users prefer design that follows conventional patterns from other familiar apps.
data.technical_spec: Instagram’s interface design is consistent with social media paradigms.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Beautiful interfaces are perceived as easier to use by users.
data.technical_spec: Attention to visual design elements such as colors, typography, and layout.
